transcript: Now I am going to explain about the time management. Time management means using our time in a proper and organized way to complete tasks efficiently. It helps us plan our daily activities and avoid wasting time. When we manage our time well, we can finish our work on time and also have time for rest and hobbies. Good time management reduces stress and increased productivity.
summary: Time management is a good way to manage our time efficiently. It helps us plan our daily activities and avoid wasting time. Good time management reduces stress and increased productivity. This is the best time management for you.
